title: Sheep Eat Grass
description: Backport to Minecraft Beta 1.7.3 of the feature from later versions where sheep regrow their wool by eating grass.
body:
# Sheep Eat Grass
Backport to Minecraft Beta 1.7.3 of the feature from later versions where sheep
regrow their wool by eating grass.

## Multiplayer
For multiplayer usage, the mod is **optional** on the client.

It is still required for the animations to work, but behaviours should be
identical with or without it.

***

[Check out the repo if you want to integrate your mod with this](https://git.sr.ht/~zekromaster/sheep-eat-grass)
